Read only the bodies needed for the current task.</input>

commentary: I’m using the project workflow skill because this is a multi-project recovery and validation pass. I’ll first read its operating rules, then inventory only the scenario metadata needed to reconstruct state before opening any referenced bodies.

The task is read-only but recovery-sensitive, so I’m loading the verification protocol for path proof and state reconstruction. After that I’ll enumerate filenames and front matter in the frozen scenario tree, keeping document-body reads demand-driven.

There are 12 independent fixtures, each centered on `PLAN.md` and `DECISIONS.md`; one selective-loading case also contains unrelated PRD/audit material, which I’m deliberately leaving unopened. I’m now reading every compact plan in full and filtering ADR ledgers to headings plus the six permitted metadata fields only.

The ADR fields are not written as simple `key: value` lines, so the narrow filter surfaced headings only. I’m broadening the matcher to the six exact field names while still suppressing all other ledger/body content; this preserves the selective-reading constraint and should reveal the actual metadata syntax.

The ledgers appear to use a compact positional format rather than named metadata keys. I’m checking the repository’s own ADR-state specification next, which is the right source for the parser contract; I won’t inspect arbitrary ledger body lines to reverse-engineer it.

The repository contains the canonical parser contract: metadata lines are Chinese `治理状态` and `替代关系`, and a dedicated `adr_index.py` implements the projection and relation checks. I’ll use that implementation shape against the current frozen tree, then independently add duplicate declarations, cycle detection, and PLAN active-reference validation where the helper’s scope is narrower.

The graph pass now cleanly separates two valid projects from ten blocked ones, with line-level diagnostics. One plan requires a semantic cross-check, so I’m opening only `12-selective-loading`’s referenced `ADR-002` section and the PRD’s `Retention Rules` H2 block; the PRD remainder, `ADR-001` body, and audit archive stay unread.
final_response:
Recovered all 12 projects and projected 28 ADR declarations using exactly:

`id, title, governance_state, replaces_ids, replaced_by_id, body_anchor`

Anchors use `docs/DECISIONS.md#<normalized-id-and-title>`.

**Results**
- `01-valid-graph`: Valid. Active: `ADR-004`, `ADR-005`, `ADR-006`; PLAN references valid.
- `02-unilateral`: Blocked. `ADR-001` points to `ADR-002`, but the reverse `replaces` declaration is absent.
- `03-direction-mismatch`: Blocked. `ADR-001` names `ADR-003`; `ADR-003` replaces only `ADR-002`.
- `04-duplicate-relation`: Blocked. Duplicate `replaced-by ADR-002` at `DECISIONS.md:7-8`.
- `05-duplicate-id`: Blocked. `ADR-001` declared at `DECISIONS.md:3` and `:11`.
- `06-missing-state`: Blocked. `ADR-001` lacks `governance_state`.
- `07-invalid-target`: Blocked. `ADR-001` replaces nonexistent `ADR-999`.
- `08-self-reference`: Blocked. `ADR-001` replaces and is replaced by itself.
- `09-cycle`: Blocked. Cycle: `ADR-001 -> ADR-002 -> ADR-001`.
- `10-status-mismatch`: Blocked. Confirmed `ADR-001` has `replaced-by ADR-002`.
- `11-plan-crosscheck`: Blocked. PLAN line 14 treats replaced `ADR-003` as active and references missing `ADR-999`.
- `12-selective-loading`: Valid. Active: `ADR-001`, `ADR-002`; PLAN references valid.

For scenario 12, only the referenced `ADR-002` body and PRD `Retention Rules` section were loaded. Both specify 30-day retention. `audits/ARCHIVE.md` was not read.

No files or persistent state were modified.

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 13.2 seconds
Output:
---
name: codex-project-workflow
description: Structure and govern Codex work for new or ambiguous projects, multi-step implementation, professional research, solution comparison, architecture and planning, third-party downloads, high-risk changes, project recovery, or requests for a rigorous workflow. Also use for ordinary multi-step project tasks when research, confirmation, implementation-path verification, recovery, or coordination may matter. Do not use for simple questions or explicit low-risk one-step edits or commands.
---

# Codex Project Workflow

## Route

1. Inspect first. Keep goal, constraints, and completion test. Ask only blocking decisions.
2. From the repo root containing this skill, run `python .agents/skills/codex-project-workflow/scripts/read_reference.py NAME "Execution Rules" "Output Requirements"`. Use `research` for unstable evidence/options; `governance` for third-party assets, installs, execution, private networking, approvals, agents, or durable changes; `verification` for writes, recovery, production/core paths, or path proof. Load each triggered protocol only.
3. Never list headings, scan skill directories, or read references directly. Report helper failure; it waives no gate.
4. Agents suit three streams, conflicting evidence, or high failure cost. Load governance, propose count/roles, ownership, parallel/main work, benefit, cost, risks, and fallback, then ask. Only explicit acceptance starts them; safe unrelated work may continue.

## Safeguards

- Never invent execution, sources, tests, or verification.
- Before writes map entry, state, boundaries, and bypasses. Freeze an evidence-bound contract first for production routing, persistence/schema/migration, architecture, core capability, alternate final output, explicit path proof, or high impact. Never borrow a neighboring or shadow implementation.
- Safety, authorization, and verification override budgets.

## Finish

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 9.1 seconds
Output:
## Execution Rules

- Create a formal implementation contract before the first relevant write when any trigger applies: production entry or routing changes; state authority, persistence, schema, or migration changes; architecture boundary or ownership changes; new, copied, or replacement core capability; a direct alternate final-output path; explicit user path proof; or high-impact commitment.
- For a generated final delivery that also writes product state or persistence, save the frozen contract to `docs/IMPLEMENTATION_CONTRACT.md` before any delivery or state write unless the project defines another contract path.
- Freeze the contract from independent evidence before writing. If the source, version, entry, state update, save path, or ownership cannot be proven, stop as implementation-path unverified; do not borrow a sibling, neighboring fixture, helper, or post-hoc contract.
- File count, module count, tests plus code, and mechanical cross-file edits do not trigger a formal contract by themselves. When every trigger is false, keep a one-to-three-line internal path constraint.
- Bind contract claims to independent project evidence such as confirmed docs, registration points, callers, runtime entry points, or state definitions. Preserve later contract differences.
- Test through the user-facing registered product entry point when applicable. A direct internal command or module call is not a substitute. If the formal entry bypasses the required core path, stop as implementation-path unverified.
- Verify result and implementation path separately. An output can be correct while the implementation is unacceptable.
- For recovery, read compact `PLAN.md` first. The initial ADR projection is exactly `id`, `title`, `governance_state`, `replaces_ids`, `replaced_by_id`, and `body_anchor`. Extract only headings and allowed metadata lines; do not sample ledger lines or bodies to discover format. Load only referenced bodies a

鍏堣鍙?PLAN锛屾仮澶嶇揣鍑戝揩鐓с€侀樁娈靛拰寮曠敤鐨勫喅瀹氱紪鍙?

arguments.title: Validate ADR state matrix
arguments.code: var fsE12 = await import('node:fs/promises'); var pathE12 = await import('node:path'); var rootE12='D:/project/.codex-eval-full/REGRESSION-20260612-02/workspaces/E12/state_matrix/scenarios'; var dirsE12=(await fsE12.readdir(rootE12,{withFileTypes:true})).filter(x=>x.isDirectory()).map(x=>x.name).sort(); function slugE12(id,title){return `docs/DECISIONS.md#${(`${id}-${title}`).toLowerCase().normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}\s-]/gu,'').trim().replace(/\s+/g,'-').replace(/-+/g,'-')}`;} function parseRelE12(items){var replaces=[],replacedBy=[],none=0,invalid=[];for(var it of items){var v=it.value.trim();if(v==='无'){none++;continue;}var a=v.match(/^replaces\s+(.+)$/i);if(a){for(var id of (a[1].match(/ADR-\d+/g)||[]))replaces.push({id,line:it.line});continue;}var b=v.match(/^replaced-by\s+(ADR-\d+)$/i);if(b){replacedBy.push({id:b[1],line:it.line});continue;}invalid.push(it);}return{replaces,replacedBy,none,invalid};} var resultsE12={}; for(var d of dirsE12){var decPath=`${rootE12}/${d}/docs/DECISIONS.md`;var planPath=`${rootE12}/${d}/docs/PLAN.md`;var s=await fsE12.readFile(decPath,'utf8');var lines=s.split(/\r?\n/);var recs=[],cur=null;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var line=lines[i];var h=line.match(/^##\s+(ADR-\d+):\s*(.+?)\s*$/);if(h){cur={id:h[1],title:h[2],headingLine:i+1,governance:[],relations:[]};recs.push(cur);continue;}if(!cur)continue;var g=line.match(/^-\s*治理状态：\s*(.*?)\s*$/);if(g)cur.governance.push({value:g[1],line:i+1});var rr=line.match(/^-\s*替代关系：\s*(.*?)\s*$/);if(rr)cur.relations.push({value:rr[1],line:i+1});}var groups=new Map();for(var r of recs){if(!groups.has(r.id))groups.set(r.id,[]);groups.get(r.id).push(r);}var unique=new Map([...groups].filter(([,v])=>v.length===1).map(([k,v])=>[k,v[0]]));var diagnostics=[];for(var [id,g] of groups)if(g.length>1)diagnostics.push({code:'DUPLICATE_ID',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:g.map(x=>x.headingLine),detail:`${id} declared ${g.length} times`});for(var r of recs){r.rel=parseRelE12(r.relations);if(r.governance.length!==1)diagnostics.push({code:'MISSING_OR_DUPLICATE_STATE',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[r.headingLine,...r.governance.map(x=>x.line)],detail:`${r.id} has ${r.governance.length} governance states`});var relGroups=new Map();for(var x of r.relations){var k=x.value.toLowerCase();if(!relGroups.has(k))relGroups.set(k,[]);relGroups.get(k).push(x);}for(var [k,hits] of relGroups)if(hits.length>1)diagnostics.push({code:'DUPLICATE_RELATION',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:hits.map(x=>x.line),detail:`${r.id}: ${hits[0].value}`});if(r.rel.invalid.length)diagnostics.push({code:'INVALID_RELATION_SYNTAX',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:r.rel.invalid.map(x=>x.line),detail:r.id});if(r.rel.none&&r.relations.length>1)diagnostics.push({code:'NONE_WITH_RELATION',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:r.relations.map(x=>x.line),detail:r.id});var rbUnique=[...new Set(r.rel.replacedBy.map(x=>x.id))];if(rbUnique.length>1)diagnostics.push({code:'MULTIPLE_REPLACED_BY',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:r.rel.replacedBy.map(x=>x.line),detail:r.id});for(var e of [...r.rel.replaces.map(x=>({...x,kind:'replaces'})),...r.rel.replacedBy.map(x=>({...x,kind:'replaced-by'}))]){if(e.id===r.id)diagnostics.push({code:'SELF_REFERENCE',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[e.line],detail:`${r.id} ${e.kind} itself`});if(!unique.has(e.id))diagnostics.push({code:'INVALID_TARGET',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[e.line],detail:`${r.id} ${e.kind} ${e.id}, target missing or ambiguous`});}}for(var r of recs){if(groups.get(r.id)?.length!==1)continue;for(var e of r.rel.replaces){var t=unique.get(e.id);if(t&&e.id!==r.id&&!t.rel.replacedBy.some(x=>x.id===r.id))diagnostics.push({code:'UNILATERAL_REPLACES',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[e.line,t.headingLine],detail:`${r.id} replaces ${e.id}, but ${e.id} does not point back`});}for(var e of r.rel.replacedBy){var src=unique.get(e.id);if(src&&e.id!==r.id&&!src.rel.replaces.some(x=>x.id===r.id))diagnostics.push({code:'UNILATERAL_REPLACED_BY',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[e.line,src.headingLine],detail:`${r.id} replaced-by ${e.id}, but ${e.id} does not replace it`});}var state=r.governance[0]?.value;var rb=[...new Set(r.rel.replacedBy.map(x=>x.id))];if(state==='已确认'&&rb.length)diagnostics.push({code:'STATUS_MISMATCH',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[r.governance[0].line,r.rel.replacedBy[0].line],detail:`${r.id} is confirmed but has replaced-by ${rb.join(', ')}`});if(state==='已替代'&&!rb.length)diagnostics.push({code:'STATUS_MISMATCH',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[r.governance[0].line],detail:`${r.id} is replaced but lacks replaced-by`});}var adj=new Map([...unique.keys()].map(x=>[x,[]]));for(var [id,r] of unique)for(var e of r.rel.replacedBy)if(unique.has(e.id)&&e.id!==id)adj.get(id).push(e.id);var color=new Map(),stack=[],cycles=new Set();function dfsE12(n){color.set(n,1);stack.push(n);for(var m of adj.get(n)){if(!color.has(m))dfsE12(m);else if(color.get(m)===1){var j=stack.indexOf(m);cycles.add([...stack.slice(j),m].join(' -> '));}}stack.pop();color.set(n,2);}for(var n of adj.keys())if(!color.has(n))dfsE12(n);for(var c of cycles)diagnostics.push({code:'REPLACEMENT_CYCLE',file:'DECISIONS.md',lines:[],detail:c});var plan=await fsE12.readFile(planPath,'utf8');var planLines=plan.split(/\r?\n/),planRefs=[];for(var i=0;i<planLines.length;i++)for(var id of (planLines[i].match(/ADR-\d+/g)||[]))planRefs.push({id,line:i+1});for(var p of planRefs){var grp=groups.get(p.id);if(!grp)diagnostics.push({code:'PLAN_MISSING_REFERENCE',file:'PLAN.md',lines:[p.line],detail:p.id});else if(grp.length!==1)diagnostics.push({code:'PLAN_AMBIGUOUS_REFERENCE',file:'PLAN.md',lines:[p.line],detail:p.id});else if(grp[0].governance[0]?.value!=='已确认'||grp[0].rel.replacedBy.length)diagnostics.push({code:'PLAN_INACTIVE_REFERENCE',file:'PLAN.md',lines:[p.line],detail:`${p.id} is not active`});}var projection=recs.map(r=>({id:r.id,title:r.title,governance_state:r.governance.length===1?r.governance[0].value:null,replaces_ids:[...new Set(r.rel.replaces.map(x=>x.id))],replaced_by_id:[...new Set(r.rel.replacedBy.map(x=>x.id))].length===1?[...new Set(r.rel.replacedBy.map(x=>x.id))][0]:null,body_anchor:slugE12(r.id,r.title)}));resultsE12[d]={projection,plan_refs:[...new Set(planRefs.map(x=>x.id))],diagnostics};} nodeRepl.write(JSON.stringify(resultsE12,null,2));

arguments.explanation: All 12 plans were recovered, 28 ADR declarations projected with the contract-defined six fields, replacement and PLAN validations completed, and the sole required semantic body cross-check confirmed.

plan.step: Inventory independent scenario projects and compact PLAN files
Validate replacement graph and PLAN references
Read only referenced bodies needed to resolve conflicts
Report per-project recovered state and blockers

forbidden_actions: load ADR reasons or decision bodies into the initial context

read audit bodies when the current state does not depend on them
